feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Intercompany Code Subcontracting Process from perspective of Supplier
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community Members, can you please suggest Steps/Processes for following SAP Business Scenario

  1. Company A and Company B belong to same Group of Companies and have SAP implemented, but each of them has different company Codes.
  2. The Company B is Subcontracting Supplier of the Company A which is the Customer.
  3. What method can be used by Company B to do GR from Company A for Processing/Subcontracting.
  4. Also, the material received at Company B should only be updated Quantity wise in its stock. Since it is valuated stock for Company A.
  5. Once the material is processed at Company B what method can be used to dispatch the processed material from Company B to Company A. This should also consider the revision of stock.

Abstract: In short, what can be the process for Intercompany Code Subcontracting Process from the perspective of Supplier i.e. Company B?

Your suggestions are deeply appreciated.

entry.title: Difference between Substitution and Supersession in S/4 and FIORI
entry.content:
Dear Gurus,

After reading many posts about Substitution and Supersession différences, i didn't understand.

Up to now I knew:
- Substitutions in ECC managed with Tcode VB12
- Interchangeability groups managed in APO with Tcode /INCMD/UI

I see that S/4 still refers to VB12 but added the concept of Supersessions in FIORI.

Please clarify the pros and cons for using one or the other.

Thank you.

entry.title: Business Partner as leading object in ECC
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am currently working on a preproject for and S/4HANA conversion and in doing so we need to activate the CVI.

As you probably know usually the BP will only get activated technically as it is a prerequisite for the conversion and the customer/supplier remain the leading object while still on ECC.

My client now requests to use the Business Partner as the leading object on ECC already, but I cannot find any documentation on that, nor do I have any experience with it.

Does anyone of you know if it is even possible to make use of the Business Partner as Customer/Supplier before going to S/4HANA and what the consequences would this have on the ECC system?

Hope you can help me out with this, thanks in advance.

 

Best regards,

Sebastian

entry.title: GR With Multiple Line split - PPV and Tariff
entry.content: Hi Experts, We have the below scenario on tariff :  Standard cost is used. Use case is the tariff need to be captured as separate line. Example: Standard cost is $4 for SKU1 / EA .  Purchase info record for SKU1 has price $5 and Tariff is 20% on purchase price. When the PO is created the line item should show the price of SKU1 as $6.  Total PO price of SKU1 PO has Price $6 . Out of $6 , $1 for Tariff and for $1 it should go to PPV. Now when the GR is posted we want Tariff $1 to post as a separate line item . The entry should be Inventory Acct 100000 Dr $4 PPV Acct 560005 Dr $1 Tariff Acct 400000 Dr$1 GR IR Accr 210000 Cr $6. We created ZTRF and included in the PO  as a condition  ZTRF and created a transaction key ZTR and included this in OBYC and assigned a GL Account that corresponds to Tariff. However when GR is created system is posting entry as below ( Inventory $4 Dr, GR/IR $6 Cr, PPV $2 Dr . instead of generating a separate line item for Tariff as below Inventory $4 Dr, GR/IR $6, PPV$1Dr,Tariff $1 Dr.  Can you suggest how to generate the seperate line item for Tariff. Thanks

entry.title: IN Payroll: Tax Computation statements required (Old / New Regime wise)
entry.content:
Hi,

 

Client is asking for Employee wise tax computation statements for Old and New Regime options in order to decide which one is better option for them.  The statement should show how much tax amounts shall be deducted.  

Please suggest any reports available in SAP which will useful for Payroll Administrators.

entry.title: Planned values remain in FAAT_PLAN_VALUE after asset deletion via AS06 – causing period-end close er
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

I hope this message finds you well.
We are currently facing a challenging issue in a customer system running SAP S/4HANA ,
and I would greatly appreciate your insights or shared experience if anyone has encountered a similar case.
__________________________________________________________________

Scenario:
Assets have been fully deleted using transaction AS06.

However, FAAT_PLAN_VALUE still contains planned value entries for those asset numbers.

The XPOST flag in these records is set to 'X', causing the system to treat them as planned assets.

This leads to blocking errors during period-end closing, such as:

“Book values are incomplete” messages,

Inconsistencies in depreciation runs,

Company codes failing to close due to unresolved planned values.

__________________________________________________________________
Questions :
1. Is this behavior expected in ALA?
Are planned values not automatically removed when the asset master is deleted (i.e., is this by design)?

2. Does SAP offer any standard cleanup report or internal tool
to remove such orphaned records from FAAT_PLAN_VALUE?

3. If not, are there any SAP-recommended methods or best practices to safely remove these entries
without compromising data consistency?

__________________________________________________________________
 Final Words:
As I have not yet been granted access to the relevant S-user authorizations from the customer client,
I am reaching out here to seek insights and advice from experienced experts in the community.

Thank you very much in advance for your time and kind support. (--) 


Sera

entry.title: While executing CIF IM 'ATP-PPM' then getting error message 'Message No. MM108' (No alternative unit
entry.content:
Hi,

An error is encountered, while executing CIF integration model PPM integration model. The error appears as 'No alternative unit of measure specified', Message No. MM108. At that time no error queues appeared neither inbound / outbound in APO nor in S4H. Thanks !

entry.title: CIF errror message 'Message No. MM108' (No alternative unit of measure specified)
entry.content: While doing CIF for the PPM integration model. The error appears as 'No alternative unit of measure specified', Message No. MM108. At that time no error queues appeared neither inbound / outbound in APO nor in S4H. Please suggest, in case any possible solution is there.... thanks!

entry.title: How to impact new batch number creation ?
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to implement custom logic, base on which system will:

create new batch number for received material

or will use the last batch number for that specific material

which exit shoud I use?

entry.title: Automatic Assignment of quantity contract to sales order line item
entry.content:
Hi All

We have a requirement where we have a quantity contract created based on departments within a ship to customer. Since the Ship to location is the same, we have mapped the individual departments to be as unloading points within a Ship to Customer. 

We have a requirement to be able to maintain a single quantity contract with the line item unloading point specifying the department within the Ship to customer. 

I would appreciate inputs from esteemed members on the following:

a. When we create a sales order, the need is to have the system determine the appropriate contract based on the unloading point entered in the line item automatically. We tried using BADI_SD_REF_DOC_CUST but it seemingly only controls the content in the pop-up window but does not assign the underlying contract to the line item.

b. When the order is received via EDI, our need is to assign the appropriate contract automatically to the sales order line item

c. If the unloading point is modified, can the reference be modified once it is assigned ?

d. A contract can be assigned at the header or can also be assigned at the line item level. What is the difference between the two options ?

Appreciate inputs from members.

entry.title: Management for Deprecated or Decommissioned CDS Views with an upgrade
entry.content:
We have upgraded our Sandbox environment from 1909 to 2023 and noticed that a few CDS views are no longer available by default and are deleted as of SAP S/4HANA 2023 release. What is the process to identify which CDS views are deprecated or replacing any deprecated CDS views with the successor? With each software upgrade, we understand there will be occurrences of deprecated CDS views or deprecated CDS view elements in the custom content, How do we find out which are deprecated or how do we utilize the Extensibility Inventory app to identify the deprecation? Is there way we can get a list or a link for SAP HELP to identify the deprecated CDS views in advance as these are out of the box CDS views that are being consumed in our environment?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Automating S/4HANA Cloud UI Deployment via CI/CD Pipeline
entry.content:
I'm currently developing an OnStack Extension on the S/4HANA Public Cloud. This includes a UI generated using SAP Fiori Elements. The development takes place in VSCode. For deployment to the S/4HANA Cloud, the @SAP/ux-ui5-tooling npm package is used, specifically the command fiori deploy --config ui5-deploy.yaml.

The current ui5-deploy.yaml looks as follows:

specVersion: "3.1"
metadata:
  name: xxx
type: application
builder:
  customTasks:
    - name: ui5-tooling-transpile-task
      afterTask: replaceVersion
      configuration:
        debug: true
        transformModulesToUI5:
          overridesToOverride: true
    - name: deploy-to-abap
      afterTask: generateCachebusterInfo
      configuration:
        target:
          url: xxx
          authenticationType: reentranceTicket
        app:
          name: xxx
          description: xxx
          package: xxx
          transport: xxx
        exclude:
          - /test/
          - /*.ts
  resources:
    excludes:
      - /test/**
      - /localService/**

This means that the deployment is currently executed in the user context using a reentrance ticket. Now, I want to automate the deployment via a CI/CD pipeline (either Azure DevOps or SAP CI/CD Service).

The challenge is that a reentrance ticket cannot be generated in an automated context. My idea was to use a technical user, but I couldn’t find a suitable Communication Scenario that would support this kind of deployment.

What would be the best way to accomplish this?

entry.title: Company Code Creation - OX02
entry.content: What is the main difference between PO Box, Postal Code and Company Postal Code and why cannot we maintain all three together ?

entry.title: Which values can be used for valuating goods receipt from a production order?
entry.content:
Hello!

Which values can be used for valuating goods receipt from a production order?
There is no material cost estimate and no sales order costing available. The value for the goods receipt is taken from the planned cost estimate of the production order.
Is there a configuration option—similar to the valuation variant for material withdrawals—where the system checks available values in a defined sequence? What does it depends on? 

 

Thank you and kind regards

Olga

entry.title: Why message displayed shows no text, only the variable 1? (BAdI BD_MMPUR_FINAL_CHECK_PO)
entry.content:
I implemented the BAdI BD_MMPUR_FINAL_CHECK_PO to do custom checks in ME22N and F0842A (purchase order).

I fill the return parameter MESSAGES with message 001 in message class ZPO ("there is an error concerning item &1") with variable 1 "00020" but the displayed error message is "00020" alone.

I expect "there is an error concerning item 00020"

Note that the message exists in English language, and ABAP code running in English.

MESSAGE e001(zpo) WITH '00020' INTO DATA(lv_message).
messages = VALUE #( ( messageid        = sy-msgid
                      messagetype      = sy-msgty
                      messagenumber    = sy-msgno
                      messagevariable1 = sy-msgv1
                      messagevariable2 = sy-msgv2
                      messagevariable3 = sy-msgv3
                      messagevariable4 = sy-msgv4 ) ).

What's the problem with the code?

Thanks.

Sandra

System: S/4HANA 2023 FPS 01 / On premises.

entry.title: [S/4HANA] What is the use of Technical User(No Address User) in SU01? Why needed?
entry.content:
Nice to meet you.
I'm a newbie who's just been put into SAP ERP System management.

When I was using SU01 regarding user management, I found the difference between ECC and S/4HANA, so I asked you.

In S/4HANA, there is a Technical User Create button apart from the Normal User Create button when creating a user in SU01.

Can you tell me why you need that kind of user and what that user is for?

 

Below is what I looked for about the Technical User.

As far as I know, Technical User does not have the Address tab, so the description of that user should be written in the Documentation tab.
Other than that, we found no other difference, and what we found in SU01's assistant document is no different.
  ※ There was only one paragraph below related information that can be found in SU01.
      Differences Between Users and Maintaining Their Address Data
      Technical User: A technical user does not have any address data.
                               Use the corresponding field on the "Documentation" tab for the description.

      If there's any other difference I've missed, please share!

(For example, is there a difference like User Type: System users, where the password-related parameters are not applied?)

 

When I checked the Help.sap documents, there was only a description of the Technical User in other SAP solutions.
In the case of Technical User on S/4HANA, there is only a description of how to create a technical user (Create Technical User) and no documentation was found to describe what an actual technical user was.

At first, I thought it was a system or external communication user, but I think this is a more appropriate description for users who correspond to User Type: System or Communications Data.

 

I simply didn't understand why it was necessary to create a separate feature for a user who didn't have Address Data.
For the other fields, it appears to be a function that exists not to enter "Last Name" as a non-essential input element.

Normally, I was typing a description of the user in that field, but is there a significant role I don't know about in that field, so is there a need to empty that field?

Could you please share with me the true use of the Technical User?

entry.title: Bapi is is not working SD_SALESDOCUMENT_CREATE
entry.content:
Hi Team 

We are using BAPI - SD_SALESDOCUMENT_CREATE for sales order return , but it is  not determinig  condtional value custom condition type  .

when we are creating return order manually by  VA01 it is workign fine .

entry.title: Monitor S.O. vs outbound delivery number
entry.content:
Hello all,

"We are going live in S4H/C on May 1, and during the hyper care period, I am looking for an app or another way to create an overview of the sales order numbers and outbound delivery numbers at a glance. Ideally, I would prefer to use the confirmed delivery date as a filter. This way, we can see which orders are planned for specific days based on the outbound delivery number."

Please share your'e knowledge with me

entry.title: Custom Fields in Contract Cash Flow (Fiori App F5491)
entry.content:
Dear Community,
I have created some additional fields for RE-FX Contracts in the “Custom Fields and Logic” app (F1481) and activated them for all possible objects.
The fields are available in the “Contract Management” app (F5273), for example, and I can also make them visible and use them in the SAP GUI by customizing the sections/screens and Badis etc..
However, the fields are not visible in the APP “Contract Cash Flow” (F5491), although they are visible in the GUI transaction REISCDCF.
Do any of you know the reason for this? Is there anything I can do to get the additional fields into the report?

Thanks in advance for any advice!

Regards
Rado

entry.title: Our customer wants to export entries in entry view, ACDOCA has document splitting,
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Our new Chinese company code has a legal requirement to store all the financial data posted in SAP, maintained in Kingdee system (Chinese government system). When we try to build a report, we face issues with entries in ACDOCA (New universal ledger table in S4HANA). ACDOCA storing entries in the document splitting view.

Businesses want only entries in the entry view (Same as BSEG Table), Is there any way we can actually get entry view line items from ACDOCA table without document splitting line items (Like zero balance line item, Split line item). or is there any other table which we can use as BSEG is no longer used in the future in S4HANA.

We also noticed tax line items are split as per profit centre in ACDOCA and amounts appearing differently in the table which is confusing.

Please let us know how do we solve this issue, Please find the attached document for more details
